### Problem you're trying to solve

<!-- What are you actually trying to build? What does the current API make hard or impossible? Concrete user stories beat abstract wishes. -->

### Proposed solution

<!-- The API or behaviour you'd like. Pseudo-code, SFC sketches, or a usage example are very welcome. -->

```ts
// rough sketch of the API you'd like
```

### Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you tried or thought about, and why they fell short. -->

### Ink prior art

<!--
vue-ink ports react-ink, so most features have an Ink counterpart. If this maps to something Ink already does, link the relevant:
- Ink docs section: https://github.com/vadimdemedes/ink#readme
- Ink component / hook source: https://github.com/vadimdemedes/ink/tree/master/src
- Ink issue or PR

If there's no Ink equivalent (vue-only feature), say so explicitly.
-->

### Related issues / components

<!-- Link to upstream Ink issues, vue-ink components this would touch (e.g. `<Box>`, `useInput`), or prior discussion. -->

### Pre-flight checklist

- [ ] I searched [existing issues](https://github.com/alexanderop/vue-ink/issues?q=is%3Aissue) and didn't find a duplicate.
- [ ] I've considered whether this belongs in core vue-ink or as a userland composable / component.
- [ ] If this diverges from Ink's behaviour, I've explained why the divergence is worth it.
